message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Verify identity: confirm the full name on the account or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. I’m still not able to pay right now.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Identity verified. I have the account ending in 1184 and the current amount due is 8400. You stated you cannot pay right now. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I can’t commit to paying right now.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Identity verified. Account ending in 1184 is due 8400. You stated you cannot pay and do not expect income within 21 days. I will note ongoing hardship and that hardship review is needed.

I understand, but I still can’t make any payment right now.

Hardship review remains the only live path. You’ve stated you cannot make any payment right now and have no income within 21 days. I’m recording that. If an approved hardship option becomes available, that is the next step.
